Special Notes about that hole: Dogleg right off the tee. Bunker left side at 210y. Open approach to green guarded by bunker front right.
Long par 5 bending left. Lay up short of the creek at 260y or go for it in two. Green slopes front to back.
Straight par 4. Two bunkers flank the green. Approach from left side of fairway for better angle.
Short par 4. Driver optional — lay up to 100y leaves full wedge. Bunker guards right side of green.
Over water to a two-tiered green. Miss right — bunker left is dead. Front pin plays longer than it looks.
Reachable par 5. Second shot over gulch at 280y out. Green runs fast and firm — don't be short.
World-famous cliffside par 3. Ocean left and beyond. Aim at the center of the green regardless of pin. Wind is always a factor.
Dogleg right along cliffs. Tee shot must carry 210y to reach the corner. Approach blind over ridge — aim at the flag stick.
Long demanding par 4. Ocean hugs the left the entire hole. Stay right off the tee. Approach plays into prevailing wind.

column9: OB right. Lay up to 100-150y is the safe play for higher handicaps.

Special Notes about that hole: Short par 4 with a narrow landing zone. Pine trees right and left. Miss short of the green — deep bunker behind.
Long par 3 over a ravine. One of the toughest holes on the course. Take one extra club — the green is elevated.
Dogleg left. Bunkers at 230y on left fairway. Approach uphill to a well-bunkered green — aim at the center.
Long par 5. Three bunkers down the left side. Can reach in two with a perfect drive. Green is large with severe slope right to left.
Uphill par 4 — plays at least one club longer than the yardage. Avoid the fairway bunker left at 195y.
One of the toughest holes. Ocean in play on the left from tee to green. Bunker short right of green is a common miss.

column10: beach behind. Club up one in wind. Back-right pin is a tough Sunday flag.

Special Notes about that hole: Finishing hole along the ocean. Lay up short of the creek at 290y or go for it. Approach plays into ocean breeze — take extra club in.
